summary: Iteration 160: Quick Search feature testing complete. All features working correctly - header button with 'Search...' and 'Ctrl+K' hint, Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut, search across 13 MongoDB collections, results grouped by category, preview panel with detailed data, navigation to tabs, keyboard navigation (Arrow keys), ESC to close, empty state message.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Quick Search button visible in header with 'Search...' text and 'Ctrl+K' hint
PASS: Clicking Quick Search button opens the search dialog
PASS: Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut opens search dialog
PASS: Typing in search input triggers API call and shows results
PASS: Results are grouped by category (Mill Entries, Cash Book, Private Paddy, Sale Vouchers, Staff, Diesel)
PASS: Each result shows title, subtitle, and date
PASS: Clicking a result navigates to the correct tab and closes dialog
PASS: Hover on result shows Eye (preview) and Arrow (navigate) buttons
PASS: Preview panel shows detailed data fields for the selected item
PASS: Preview panel has 'Open in [Tab]' button to navigate
PASS: ESC key closes the search dialog
PASS: Arrow up/down keys navigate between results
PASS: Empty state shows 'Koi result nahi mila' when no results found
PASS: Backend /api/quick-search returns grouped results from 13 collections
PASS: Special characters in search query are handled safely (regex escaped)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Quick Search UI tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Search feature fully tested and working. The feature searches across 13 MongoDB collections: mill_entries, cash_transactions, private_paddy, sale_vouchers, purchase_vouchers, dc_entries, staff, milling_entries, diesel_accounts, mill_parts_stock, hemali_payments, rice_sales, truck_leases. API limit is max 20 results per collection.

search_functionality.result_structure: PASS - id, type, tab, title, subtitle, date, data
